name: Hannibal Lecter and Will Graham
description:
Hannibal and Will survived the fall, reaching Cuba, where they settled to live.

After a few weeks, they discover that a new person will move into the old house next to theirs.

Will it be a problem or will it be the birth of something new?

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
